finding.summary: coherent-public search reuses one sampled opponent development-card allocation for the entire current-turn tree and its opponent-boundary continuation value
finding.resource_hand_caveat: in two-player no-trade, public bank composition plus the root actor's known hand fixes the sole opponent's resource composition by conservation
remaining_hidden_variables: history-conditioned probability of hidden development-card allocations
finding.operator_effect: extra simulations reduce within-world tree noise but do not integrate boundary belief; nonlinear completed-Q normalization and policy improvement make the result an operator bias, not only zero-mean label noise

code_evidence.fact: calls determinize_for_player once and searches that one sampled world with the full budget
passes the already sampled world to one native gumbel_search arena
stops at the first opponent/new-turn node and reuses that node's prior value after one expansion
evaluates from the side-to-act perspective, preserving that actor's own sampled private hand, then negates for root perspective
samples opponent development cards from conservation constraints and currently requires observer == current player
asserts exactly one determinization seed for a coherent n128 search

arms: boundary K2 at matched neural rows
boundary K4 at matched neural rows
legacy root PIMC P4 at matched total compute
matched_compute_experiment.adjudicator: boundary K16 with multiple tree seeds and larger budget

recommended_fix.name: coherent_current_turn_tree_with_boundary_value_particles
recommended_fix.native_requirement: a new non-current-observer determinization primitive that preserves the root observer's information and never depends on authoritative hidden identities
recommended_fix.evaluator_requirement: a value-only batched boundary API; opponent priors across hidden-dependent legal sets must not be fabricated or averaged
recommended_fix.provenance_requirement: particle count, belief implementation version, seed contract, and neural evaluation count must bind teacher identity

production_recommendation: retain coherent n128 K1 as baseline; do not presume global n256 is stronger until matched-compute boundary-particle adjudication
